name: saiteja-aura
description: Aura — the saiteja.ai design system. A small, opinionated set of tokens, blocks, and inheritance hooks for building 'quietly forged' interfaces.

items.name: sairam-tokens
items.title: Aura tokens
items.description: CSS custom properties for color, type, spacing, motion, and radius. The foundation every other Aura block depends on. Adds @keyframes aura-breathe and pulse-dot. NOTE: Geist font @import must be added manually to your root stylesheet — comment at top of file shows the line.

items.name: aura-mark
items.title: Aura mark (breathing ring)
items.description: The brand mark. Three concentric circles, innermost breathing on a 4s sine. Use as splash, footer, or one status indicator.

items.name: aura-credit
items.title: Aura made-by credit
items.description: Inheritance hook #1 — the footer mark. 'quietly forged at saiteja.ai' with the breathing mark beside it. Drop in every shipped factory app's footer.

items.name: aura-boot
items.title: Aura console signature
items.description: Inheritance hook #2 — print the Aura signature in DevTools at app boot. Idempotent. Call once at your earliest client-side entry.

items.name: status-badge
items.title: Status badge
items.description: Mono pill mapping status strings (live, building, ready, idle, reviewing, failed) to color + breathing dot. Extend the CONFIG map for new statuses.

items.name: skeleton-block
items.title: Skeleton block
items.description: Shimmer placeholder for inline list/text loaders. For primary loading states, prefer the Aura mark.

items.name: inline-error
items.title: Inline error
items.description: Calm warning banner. Soft red wash with a 2px left rule. Optional retry + dismiss.

items.name: tab-bar
items.title: Tab bar
items.description: Generic tabs. Mono labels, hairline rule, accent underline on active.

items.name: theme-chip
items.title: Theme chip
items.description: Tiny mono pill for tags / categories.

items.name: pull-quote
items.title: Pull quote
items.description: Display italic 200, accent left rule. Use sparingly — one per page.

items.name: empty-state
items.title: Empty state
items.description: Display headline (with optional italic phrase), lede, optional action. The 'voice' check — if the headline doesn't sound like a soft rotation, rewrite it.

items.name: card-with-meta
items.title: Card with meta
items.description: The standard plate. Mono crumb above title, hairline border at rest, accent border on hover.
